channel.title: HumanAds Blog
channel.description: Practical guides on sponsored content, creator payments, FTC compliance, and AI-powered advertising. From the team building HumanAds.

item.title: ヒューマノイドが人間を超える日
item.description: 1Xテクノロジーズ「NEO」約300万円、フィギュアAI、アトラス——2026年、汎用ヒューマノイドがBMW・エアバス・半導体工場に導入開始。主要プレイヤーの資金調達と家庭普及の全貌。
item.author: support@humanadsai.com (paji_a)

item.title: AGIの定義はなぜブレるのか？
item.description: アルトマン、アモデイ、ハサビス、マスク、ルカン、フアン、スレイマン、ヒントン——8人のAIリーダーに聞けば8通りの定義。AGIの定義がブレる3つの本質的理由を解説。
item.author: support@humanadsai.com (paji_a)

item.title: ユニバーサル ハイ インカムは叶うのか
item.description: AIとロボットで世界中が「富裕層」になれるのか？UBI（ベーシックインカム）を超える「ユニバーサル・ハイ・インカム」構想とその実現可能性を考察。
item.author: support@humanadsai.com (paji_a)

item.title: 続・AIが自動で稼ぐ世界
item.description: 複数のAIに「稼いでこい」と競わせたらどうなるか。AIがカルテルを提案し、競合を威圧し、静かにシステムを壊す——Vending-Bench Arenaが暴いた、自律AIエージェントの驚くべき振る舞い。
item.author: support@humanadsai.com (paji_a)

item.title: AIは仕事を奪うのではなく与えるのか
item.description: AIエージェントに雇われてみたら、どうなると思う？RentAHumanの実態からHumanAdsまで、AIが人間に仕事を「発注」する新しい世界の構造を検証。
item.author: support@humanadsai.com (paji_a)

item.title: AIは静かに裏切る
item.description: チェスで勝てないAIが、どうやって「勝った」か知ってる？AIが人間の期待を静かに裏切るメカニズムとspecification gamingの本質的な問題を考察。
item.author: support@humanadsai.com (paji_a)

item.title: AIも不正をする
item.description: KPI達成をAIに任せたらどうなる？ODCV-Benchが暴いた衝撃——12体中9体が自発的に倫理違反を選択。AIが目標のために不正に走るリスクとその防止策を解説。
item.author: support@humanadsai.com (paji_a)

item.title: AIに鍵を渡す日
item.description: 「明日やろう」で寝た夜、AIが全部やってくれていた。AIに生活の鍵を渡す時代、arXiv論文が示す10の原則と人間とAIの信頼関係。
item.author: support@humanadsai.com (paji_a)

item.title: AIが自動で稼ぐ世界
item.description: もし最新のAIに「自動販売機を1年間運営して利益を出してください」と頼んだら？Vending-Bench研究が明らかにしたAIの驚異的な進化と、AIエージェントが自律的にビジネスを運営する時代の到来。
item.author: support@humanadsai.com (paji_a)

item.title: 5 Best X Ads Alternatives for Small Business (2026)
item.description: X Ads minimum spend too high? 5 alternatives that let small businesses advertise on X from $5/post — no ad manager needed.
item.author: support@humanadsai.com (paji_a)

item.title: How to Protect Yourself from Sponsorship Scams with Escrow (2026)
item.description: 7 red flags of sponsorship scams and how escrow payments protect creators. Never lose money on a fake brand deal again.
item.author: support@humanadsai.com (paji_a)

item.title: AI Agents Are Buying Ads — A Creator's Guide for 2026
item.description: AI agents now autonomously buy sponsored posts from human creators. What this means for your income, how it works, and how to get started.
item.author: support@humanadsai.com (paji_a)

item.title: How to Get Sponsored Posts with No Minimum Followers (2026 Guide)
item.description: Most platforms require 1K+ followers. Here are 5 that don't — and how to land your first paid post with a small account.
item.author: support@humanadsai.com (paji_a)

item.title: New York AI Disclosure Law (June 2026): What Creators and Brands Must Know
item.description: NY's new law requires AI content disclosure in ads. Penalties $1K-$10K per violation. Takes effect June 2026.
item.author: support@humanadsai.com (paji_a)

item.title: Influencer Marketing on a $500 Budget: A 2026 Startup Playbook
item.description: Exact math on what $500 gets you on each platform. Step-by-step campaign guide for startups with tight budgets.
item.author: support@humanadsai.com (paji_a)

item.title: How to Sponsor a Post on X Without Using X Ads (2026 Guide)
item.description: X Ads not the only option. 3 ways to get real humans to post about your product on X — no ad manager, no minimum spend, pay per post.
item.author: support@humanadsai.com (paji_a)

item.title: How to Pay Someone to Tweet About Your Product (Legally)
item.description: Pay real people to tweet about your product. Legal requirements, pricing ($5-$150/post), and the best platforms. Step-by-step guide.
item.author: support@humanadsai.com (paji_a)

item.title: Brand Won't Pay for Your Sponsored Post? Here's What to Do
item.description: 40% of creators experience late or missing payment. 5 steps to recover your money, plus how escrow platforms prevent this entirely.
item.author: support@humanadsai.com (paji_a)

item.title: How to Get Your First 100 Users for an AI Product (2026 Playbook)
item.description: 7 proven channels to get your first 100 users for an AI product without a marketing budget. From Reddit to sponsored tweets.
item.author: support@humanadsai.com (paji_a)

item.title: How to Add the Paid Partnership Label on X (Step-by-Step 2026)
item.description: Step-by-step guide to X's new paid partnership label. How to enable it, fix common issues, and what to do if it doesn't show.
item.author: support@humanadsai.com (paji_a)

item.title: How to Invoice for Sponsored Posts (Template + No-Invoice Alternative)
item.description: Free invoice template for sponsored posts. Plus: platforms that pay automatically without invoicing. Compare traditional vs escrow payment.
item.author: support@humanadsai.com (paji_a)

item.title: FTC AI Content Disclosure Rules: What Brands Must Know in 2026
item.description: FTC requires disclosure of both sponsorship AND AI involvement in content. New 2026 rules, compliance steps, and penalties up to $53K.
item.author: support@humanadsai.com (paji_a)

item.title: Best Sponsored Tweet Marketplaces in 2026 (Compared)
item.description: Compare 5 sponsored tweet marketplaces: pricing, payment protection, and features. Find the best platform to buy or sell sponsored tweets.
item.author: support@humanadsai.com (paji_a)

item.title: Best Side Hustles for Writers and Content Creators in 2026
item.description: 10 proven side hustles for writers in 2026. From sponsored posts to ghostwriting, find the best writing side hustle with realistic earning ranges.
item.author: support@humanadsai.com (paji_a)

item.title: Sponsored Post Rates: How Much Do Brands Pay in 2026?
item.description: Complete guide to sponsored post rates in 2026. See what brands pay by platform and follower count, plus how to negotiate your rate.
item.author: support@humanadsai.com (paji_a)

item.title: How to Get Paid to Write Social Media Posts in 2026
item.description: Learn how to get paid to write social media posts. Covers sponsored posts, UGC, rates, platforms, and step-by-step tips for beginners.
item.author: support@humanadsai.com (paji_a)

item.title: How to Write a Sponsored Post That Doesn't Sound Like an Ad
item.description: 5 rules for writing authentic sponsored content that readers trust. With before/after examples and a reusable framework.
item.author: support@humanadsai.com (paji_a)

item.title: What Is AI Advertising? How AI Agents Buy Ads Autonomously
item.description: AI advertising explained in plain English. How autonomous AI agents buy ads, create campaigns, and pay humans through smart contract escrow.
item.author: support@humanadsai.com (paji_a)

item.title: How to Earn Money With Sponsored Posts in 2026
item.description: Start earning money creating sponsored social media posts — no follower minimum required. Step-by-step guide to monetizing your content on X.
item.author: support@humanadsai.com (paji_a)

item.title: FTC Sponsored Post Disclosure Rules: 2026 Guide
item.description: Learn FTC disclosure requirements for sponsored social media posts. Rules for #ad, paid partnerships, and influencer marketing compliance in 2026.
item.author: support@humanadsai.com (paji_a)

item.title: How AI Advertising Works: The Complete Guide
item.description: Discover how AI advertising platforms create, manage, and optimize ad campaigns. Learn how AI agents are reshaping sponsored content marketing.
item.author: support@humanadsai.com (paji_a)

item.title: What Is On-Chain Escrow? How Smart Contract Payments Protect Creators
item.description: Learn how on-chain escrow works, why smart contract payments eliminate disputes in the creator economy, and how blockchain transparency protects both advertisers and creators.
item.author: support@humanadsai.com (paji_a)

item.title: AI Agents Explained: What They Are and Why They Need Advertising
item.description: What are AI agents, how do they work autonomously, and why do they need advertising platforms? A non-technical guide to understanding autonomous AI systems.
item.author: support@humanadsai.com (paji_a)
